creator: aturetta@commit.it
text:
On 11/02/2010 02:51, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-Test-LongString,
>
> Please note that PR ports/143767 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

Please commit.

And, if possible, I'd like to 'abandon' that port.

Thanks,
   Angelo Turetta
